discovery_keys.c(3) Library Functions Manual discovery_keys.c(3)

NAME

discovery_keys.c - Discovery Server Public Key Trust Management Implementation.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_download_https (const char *url, uint8_t pubkey_out[32])
asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_load_file (const char *file_path, uint8_t pubkey_out[32])
asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_get_cache_path (const char *acds_server, char *path_out, size_t path_size)
asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_load_cached (const char *acds_server, uint8_t pubkey_out[32])
asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_save_cached (const char *acds_server, const uint8_t pubkey[32])
asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_clear_cache (const char *acds_server)
asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_verify_change (const char *acds_server, const uint8_t old_pubkey[32], const uint8_t new_pubkey[32])
asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_verify (const char *acds_server, const char *key_spec, uint8_t pubkey_out[32])

Detailed Description

Discovery Server Public Key Trust Management Implementation.

Author

Zachary Fogg me@zfo.gg

Date

January 2026

Definition in file discovery_keys.c.

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_clear_cache (const char * acds_server)

Definition at line 186 of file discovery_keys.c.

186                                                                       {
187   if (!acds_server) {
188     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_clear_cache");
189   }
190 
191   char cache_path[PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH];
192   asciichat_error_t result = discovery_keys_get_cache_path(acds_server, cache_path, sizeof(cache_path));
193   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
194     return result;
195   }
196 
197   if (platform_is_regular_file(cache_path)) {
198     if (remove(cache_path) != 0) {
199       return SET_ERRNO_SYS(ERROR_FILE_OPERATION, "Failed to delete cached key: %s", cache_path);
200     }
201     log_debug("Cleared cached ACDS key for server: %s", acds_server);
202   }
203 
204   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
205 }




References discovery_keys_get_cache_path(),
    platform_is_regular_file(), PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH, and
    SET_ERRNO.






asciichat_error_t
  discovery_keys_download_https (const char * url, uint8_t
  pubkey_out[32])


Definition at line 58 of file discovery_keys.c.


58                                                                                          {
59   if (!url || !pubkey_out) {
60     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_download_https");
61   }
62 
63   log_debug("Downloading ACDS key from %s", url);
64 
65   // Use existing parse_public_key infrastructure which handles HTTPS URLs
66   public_key_t key;
67   asciichat_error_t result = parse_public_key(url, &key);
68   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
69     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO_KEY, "Failed to download and parse ACDS key from %s", url);
70   }
71 
72   memcpy(pubkey_out, key.key, 32);
73   log_debug("Successfully downloaded and parsed ACDS key from %s", url);
74   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
75 }






References parse_public_key(), and SET_ERRNO.






asciichat_error_t
  discovery_keys_get_cache_path (const char * acds_server, char * path_out,
  size_t path_size)


Definition at line 100 of file discovery_keys.c.


100                                                                                                            {
101   if (!acds_server || !path_out || path_size == 0) {
102     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_get_cache_path");
103   }
104 
105   char *config_dir = get_config_dir();
106   if (!config_dir) {
107     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CONFIG, "Failed to get config directory");
108   }
109 
110   // Path: ~/.config/ascii-chat/acds_keys/<hostname>/key.pub
111   safe_snprintf(path_out, path_size, "%s" ACDS_KEYS_CACHE_DIR PATH_SEPARATOR_STR "%s" PATH_SEPARATOR_STR "key.pub",
112                 config_dir, acds_server);
113   SAFE_FREE(config_dir);
114 
115   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
116 }

    safe_snprintf(), and SET_ERRNO.

asciichat_error_t
  discovery_keys_load_cached (const char * acds_server, uint8_t
  pubkey_out[32])


Definition at line 118 of file discovery_keys.c.


118                                                                                               {
119   if (!acds_server || !pubkey_out) {
120     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_load_cached");
121   }
122 
123   char cache_path[PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH];
124   asciichat_error_t result = discovery_keys_get_cache_path(acds_server, cache_path, sizeof(cache_path));
125   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
126     return result;
127   }
128 
129   // Check if cached key exists
130   if (!platform_is_regular_file(cache_path)) {
131     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_FILE_NOT_FOUND, "No cached key for ACDS server: %s", acds_server);
132   }
133 
134   // Load cached key using existing infrastructure
135   return discovery_keys_load_file(cache_path, pubkey_out);
136 }

  discovery_keys_load_file (const char * file_path, uint8_t

78   if (!file_path || !pubkey_out) {
79     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_load_file");
80   }
81 
82   log_debug("Loading ACDS key from file: %s", file_path);
83 
84   // Use existing parse_public_key infrastructure which handles file paths

86   asciichat_error_t result = parse_public_key(file_path, &key);

89   }
90

Referenced by discovery_keys_load_cached().






asciichat_error_t
  discovery_keys_save_cached (const char * acds_server, const uint8_t
  pubkey[32])


Definition at line 138 of file discovery_keys.c.


138                                                                                                 {
139   if (!acds_server || !pubkey) {
140     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_save_cached");
141   }
142 
143   char cache_path[PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH];
144   asciichat_error_t result = discovery_keys_get_cache_path(acds_server, cache_path, sizeof(cache_path));
145   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
146     return result;
147   }
148 
149   // Create cache directory if it doesn't exist
150   char dir_path[PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH];
151   safe_snprintf(dir_path, sizeof(dir_path), "%s", cache_path);
152 
153   // Find the last path separator (handle both / and \ for cross-platform compatibility)
154   char *last_sep = strrchr(dir_path, '\\');
155   if (!last_sep) {
156     last_sep = strrchr(dir_path, '/');
157   }
158 
159   if (last_sep) {
160     *last_sep = '\0';
161     if (!platform_is_directory(dir_path)) {
162       asciichat_error_t result = platform_mkdir(dir_path, 0700);
163       if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
164         return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_FILE_OPERATION, "Failed to create ACDS key cache directory: %s", dir_path);
165       }
166     }
167   }
168 
169   // Save key in OpenSSH public key format
170   FILE *f = platform_fopen("file_stream", cache_path, "w");
171   if (!f) {
172     return SET_ERRNO_SYS(ERROR_FILE_OPERATION, "Failed to create cache file: %s", cache_path);
173   }
174 
175   // Convert binary Ed25519 key to base64 for OpenSSH format
176   char base64_key[128];
177   sodium_bin2base64(base64_key, sizeof(base64_key), pubkey, 32, sodium_base64_VARIANT_ORIGINAL);
178 
179   fprintf(f, "ssh-ed25519 %s acds-cached-key\n", base64_key);
180   fclose(f);
181 
182   log_debug("Cached ACDS key for server: %s", acds_server);
183   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
184 }






References discovery_keys_get_cache_path(),
    platform_fopen(), PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH,
    safe_snprintf(), and SET_ERRNO.


Referenced by discovery_keys_verify().






asciichat_error_t
  discovery_keys_verify (const char * acds_server, const char * key_spec,
  uint8_t pubkey_out[32])


Definition at line 254 of file discovery_keys.c.


254                                                                                                                {
255   if (!acds_server || !pubkey_out) {
256     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_verify");
257   }
258 
259   uint8_t new_pubkey[32];
260   asciichat_error_t result;
261   bool is_official = is_official_server(acds_server);
262 
263   // ===========================================================================
264   // Step 1: Obtain the public key
265   // ===========================================================================
266 
267   if (!key_spec && is_official) {
268     // Automatic trust for official server: try SSH key first, then GPG
269     log_info("Attempting automatic HTTPS key trust for official ACDS server");
270 
271     public_key_t key;
272     result = parse_public_key(ACDS_OFFICIAL_KEY_SSH_URL, &key);
273     if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
274       log_debug("SSH key download failed, trying GPG key");
275       result = parse_public_key(ACDS_OFFICIAL_KEY_GPG_URL, &key);
276     }
277 
278     if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
279       return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Failed to download key from official ACDS server");
280     }
281 
282     memcpy(new_pubkey, key.key, 32);
283 
284   } else if (!key_spec) {
285     // No key_spec and not official server = error
286     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
287                      "Third-party ACDS servers require explicit --discovery-service-key configuration."
288                      "Only %s has automatic trust.",
289                      ACDS_OFFICIAL_SERVER);
290 
291   } else {
292     // Use parse_public_key for all other cases (handles HTTPS, files, github:, gitlab:, etc.)
293     public_key_t key;
294     result = parse_public_key(key_spec, &key);
295     if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
296       return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO_KEY, "Failed to load/download ACDS key from: %s", key_spec);
297     }
298 
299     memcpy(new_pubkey, key.key, 32);
300   }
301 
302   // ===========================================================================
303   // Step 2: Check cache and handle key changes
304   // ===========================================================================
305 
306   uint8_t cached_pubkey[32];
307   result = discovery_keys_load_cached(acds_server, cached_pubkey);
308 
309   if (result == ASCIICHAT_OK) {
310     // Cached key exists - compare
311     if (memcmp(cached_pubkey, new_pubkey, 32) != 0) {
312       // Key changed - require user verification
313       result = discovery_keys_verify_change(acds_server, cached_pubkey, new_pubkey);
314       if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
315         return result; // User rejected or error
316       }
317 
318       // User accepted - update cache
319       result = discovery_keys_save_cached(acds_server, new_pubkey);
320       if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
321         log_warn("Failed to update cached key, continuing anyway");
322       }
323     } else {
324       log_debug("ACDS key matches cached key for: %s", acds_server);
325     }
326 
327   } else {
328     // No cached key - save it for next time
329     log_info("First connection to ACDS server: %s, caching key", acds_server);
330     result = discovery_keys_save_cached(acds_server, new_pubkey);
331     if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
332       log_warn("Failed to cache key, continuing anyway");
333     }
334   }
335 
336   // ===========================================================================
337   // Step 3: Return verified key
338   // ===========================================================================
339 
340   memcpy(pubkey_out, new_pubkey, 32);
341   log_debug("ACDS key verification successful for: %s", acds_server);
342   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
343 }






References discovery_keys_load_cached(),
    discovery_keys_save_cached(), discovery_keys_verify_change(),
    parse_public_key(), and SET_ERRNO.


Referenced by client_crypto_init().






asciichat_error_t
  discovery_keys_verify_change (const char * acds_server, const uint8_t
  old_pubkey[32], const uint8_t new_pubkey[32])


Definition at line 211 of file discovery_keys.c.


212                                                                              {
213   if (!acds_server || !old_pubkey || !new_pubkey) {
214     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_verify_change");
215   }
216 
217   char old_fingerprint[65], new_fingerprint[65];
218   compute_key_fingerprint(old_pubkey, old_fingerprint);
219   compute_key_fingerprint(new_pubkey, new_fingerprint);
220 
221   const char *warning_msg =
222     "\n"
223     "⚠️  WARNING: ACDS SERVER KEY HAS CHANGED\n"
224     "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n"
225     "Server: %s\n"
226     "\n"
227     "Old key (SHA256): %s\n"
228     "New key (SHA256): %s\n"
229     "\n"
230     "This could indicate:\n"
231     "  1. The server operator rotated their key\n"
232     "  2. A man-in-the-middle attack is in progress\n"
233     "\n"
234     "Verify the new key fingerprint with the server operator before accepting.\n"
235     "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n";
236 
237   // Log to both stderr (via log_warn) and file log
238   log_warn(warning_msg, acds_server, old_fingerprint, new_fingerprint);
239 
240   // Ask user to confirm
241   bool accepted = platform_prompt_yes_no("Accept new ACDS server key", false);
242   if (!accepted) {
243     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO_VERIFICATION, "User rejected ACDS key change for: %s", acds_server);
244   }
245 
246   log_info("User accepted ACDS key change for: %s", acds_server);
247   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
248 }






References compute_key_fingerprint(),
    platform_prompt_yes_no(), and SET_ERRNO.
